CustomField.description: Actual MR Calculated based on the type of Reconciliation. This field will be zero for Excess Utilization type of Reconciliation. For a Trueup Reconciliation record, Invoiced amount will also consider the amounts invoiced from previously reconciled record for the same period.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Actual MR Calculated based on the type of Reconciliation. This field will be zero for Excess Utilization type of Reconciliation. For a Trueup Reconciliation record, Invoiced amount will also consider the amounts invoiced from previously reconciled record for the same period.
CustomField.label: MR Actual
